description: External and internal datasets mapped to the CadStruct MoE ontology.

floorplancad.notes: Existing target-domain CAD/floor-plan corpus for hard_wall, door, and window morphology.

cvc_fp_figshare.notes: Existing robustness corpus. Annotation conversion needs source-specific audit before room training.

cubicasa5k_zenodo.notes: Official CubiCasa5K package. Use SVG polygons/icons for rooms, openings, and object categories.

deepfloorplan.notes: Room-boundary and room-type masks. Useful for room expert pretraining, less useful for graph-level symbols.

rplan.notes: Large room-layout corpus for topology priors. Verify access and license before ingestion.

resplan.notes: Promising vector-graph dataset. Do not depend on it until data availability and license are confirmed.

sesyd_grec_symbols.notes: Synthetic symbol-spotting benchmarks. Use for stress tests, not as sole real-drawing evidence.

doclaynet.notes: Generic layout pretraining for title blocks/tables. Not floorplan-specific.

publaynet.notes: Generic document layout pretraining. Use only as transfer data.

internal_dimensions_v1.notes: Required for real dimension/text claims. Public floorplan datasets are insufficient for target-domain dimension extraction.
